assertions.assertion: States that v4 uses HybridCache for token caching (not the old IDistributedCache directly)
assertions.rationale: HybridCache in v4 is a very recent and specific implementation detail

assertions.assertion: Explains the two-tier L1 (in-memory) + L2 (distributed) cache architecture
assertions.rationale: The two-tier architecture is v4-specific internal design

assertions.assertion: Notes that explicit AddDistributedMemoryCache() registration is no longer required in v4
assertions.rationale: This v4 behavioral change is not widely known

assertions.assertion: Mentions CacheLifetimeBuffer as a configuration option for controlling token refresh timing
assertions.rationale: CacheLifetimeBuffer is a Duende-specific option name
